**Available formats:**
• Markdown (.md)
• JSON (.json)
• PDF (.pdf)

*Created by H.A.C.A*

config.haca_ignore_info:
You can exclude any area, device, entity, automation, scene, script or helper from HACA scans by adding the haca_ignore label to it in Home Assistant.
Go to Settings → Labels to create the label, then assign it to the elements you want to ignore.
config.mcp_token_description: AI-chatten kan udføre handlinger direkte i HA (opret automatiseringer, fejlfind, styr enheder…). For eksterne MCP-klienter (Claude Code) skal du angive dit token.

ai_explain.preview_only: ⚠️ Kun forhåndsvisning — ingen ændringer anvendes før du klikker Anvend

ai_explain.applied_backup: En sikkerhedskopi blev oprettet inden ændringen.

optimizer.multi_yaml: · YAML indeholder flere automatiseringer adskilt af ---

haca_ignore.info_body: Add the label haca_ignore to any entity, automation, script, scene, device or area in Home Assistant to exclude it from all HACA scans.
haca_ignore.info_how: Labels can be managed in Settings → Entities / Automations / Devices / Areas.

toast.config_saved_restart: Konfiguration gemt. Genstart HA for at anvende ændringer.

types.helper_orphaned_disabled_only: Helper only used by disabled automations
types.template_now_without_trigger: Template using now() without time trigger

hints.device_id_in_trigger: Uses device_id which breaks if the device is re-paired. Switch to entity_id.
hints.device_id_in_action: Uses device_id in action — fragile after device re-pairing.
hints.device_id_in_target: Uses device_id in target — switch to entity_id for reliability.
hints.device_trigger_platform: Device trigger platform — consider entity-based trigger.
hints.device_id_in_condition: Uses device_id in condition — fragile reference.
hints.device_condition_platform: Device condition platform — consider entity-based condition.
hints.template_simple_state: Template can be simplified to a state condition.
hints.incorrect_mode_motion_single: Motion automation in single mode may miss events. Use restart.
hints.deprecated_service: Uses a deprecated service call — update to the new name.
hints.unknown_service: Calls a service that doesn't exist in your HA instance.
hints.no_description: No description set — add one for documentation.
hints.no_alias: No alias/name set — harder to identify in HA UI.
hints.duplicate_automation: Very similar to another automation — consider merging.
hints.probable_duplicate_automation: Possibly duplicated logic — review both automations.
hints.ghost_automation: References entities that no longer exist.
hints.never_triggered: Has never been triggered since HA started tracking.
hints.excessive_delay: Contains a very long delay — may block the automation queue.
hints.zombie_entity: Referenced in automations but no longer exists in HA.
hints.unavailable_entity: Entity is currently unavailable — check device connection.
hints.stale_entity: Entity hasn't updated in a long time — may be disconnected.
hints.god_automation: Very complex automation — consider splitting into smaller ones.
hints.potential_self_loop: May trigger itself recursively — check trigger/action entities.
hints.hardcoded_secret: Contains what looks like a hardcoded API key or password.
hints.sensitive_data_exposure: Sensitive data may be exposed in notifications or logs.
hints.high_complexity_actions: High number of actions — harder to maintain and debug.
hints.high_parallel_max: High parallel_max value may overload HA.
hints.script_orphan: Script is never called by any automation or other script.
hints.script_cycle: Scripts call each other in a cycle — may cause infinite loops.
hints.helper_unused: Helper is not referenced in any automation or script.
hints.compliance_unused_label: Label exists but isn't assigned to any entity, device, or automation.
hints.dashboard_missing_entity: Dashboard references an entity that doesn't exist.
hints.blueprint_empty_input: Blueprint has an input field with no value set.

compliance.info: Overensstemmelsestabbet kontrollerer HA bedste praksis: hjælper navngivning, områdeikoner, automatiseringsbeskrivelser.
compliance.area_limit_notice: Only the first 150 entities without area are shown. Assign areas via Settings → Devices & Services → Devices to clear these issues.

mcp.hint_claude_code: Kør: claude mcp add-json haca (indsæt JSON nedenfor). Ingen proxy nødvendig, Claude Code understøtter HTTP direkte.
mcp.hint_claude_desktop: Claude Desktop understøtter kun stdio-transport. Forudsætning: installér uvx ved at køre 'pip install uv' (eller 'pipx install uv') i en terminal. Kopiér JSON nedenfor til konfigurationsfilen: Windows: C:\Users\<BRUGER>\AppData\Roaming\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (også tilgængelig via %APPDATA%\Claude\) — macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json. Genstart Claude Desktop fuldstændigt (Filer → Afslut, ikke bare luk).
mcp.ip_warning: Hvis homeassistant.local ikke virker, brug IP-adressen på din Home Assistant-server (f.eks. http://192.168.1.x:8123). Nogle MCP-klienter kan ikke opløse .local-adresser.
mcp.title: HACA MCP-server
mcp.subtitle: Forbind Claude Code (eller enhver MCP-kompatibel AI-agent) til din HA: audit, oprettelse af automatiseringer, fejlfinding, dashboards.
mcp.token_hint: Opret et token i din HA-profil →
mcp.hint_cursor: Cursor → Settings → Tools & MCP → + Add new MCP server | Fil: ~/.cursor/mcp.json
mcp.hint_vscode: Copilot Agent mode → .vscode/mcp.json (Ctrl+Shift+P → 'MCP: Open User Configuration')
mcp.hint_windsurf: Windsurf → Cascade → MCP Servers → View raw config | Fil: ~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json
mcp.hint_cline: VS Code → Cline-udvidelse → MCP Servers → Configure → cline_mcp_settings.json
mcp.hint_antigravity: Kræver mcp-proxy. Installér: pip install mcp-proxy. -H flaget sender Bearer-tokenet til HACA.
mcp.hint_openwebui: Admin Panel → Tools → MCP → Add Server → indsæt URL og auth-header
mcp.hint_n8n: Node MCP Client Tool → URL + Auth Header (HTTP/SSE-tilstand)
mcp.hint_http: Enhver HTTP-klient: curl, Postman, Insomnia osv.
mcp.guide_stdio_info: Claude Desktop understøtter kun stdio-transport. En bro (uvx mcp-proxy) er nødvendig for at forbinde til HACAs HTTP-server.
mcp.guide_proxy_info: Antigravity / Gemini kræver mcp-proxy som bro til HACAs HTTP-server.
mcp.guide_restart_detail: Filer → Afslut (ikke bare luk vinduet), genstart derefter.
mcp.guide_antigravity_detail: I Antigravity: Settings → MCP Servers → Add → indsæt JSON ovenfor. I Gemini CLI: tilføj i ~/.gemini/settings.json.

agent.title: Proaktiv AI-agent
agent.subtitle: Baggrundsanalyse, problemkorrelationer, automatisk ugentlig rapport og præferencelæring.
agent.report_freq_hint: Kontrolleres én gang om dagen. Rapport sendes, når det valgte interval er nået.

compliance_messages.no_friendly_name: Hjælperen '{entity_id}' har intet venligt navn. Tilføj et beskrivende navn i Indstillinger → Hjælpere.
compliance_messages.raw_entity_name: Enheden '{entity_id}' bruger et råt enhedsnavn som venligt navn: '{friendly_name}'. Erstat det med et læsbart navn.
compliance_messages.area_no_icon: Området '{name}' har intet ikon. Tilføj et ikon i Indstillinger → Områder.
compliance_messages.unused_label: Etiketten '{name}' er defineret, men ikke tildelt nogen enhed. Tildel den eller slet den.
compliance_messages.automation_no_description: Automatiseringen '{alias}' har ingen beskrivelse. Tilføj et 'description:' felt for at dokumentere dens formål.
compliance_messages.automation_no_unique_id: Automatiseringen '{alias}' har intet 'id:' felt. Uden et unikt id kan den ikke redigeres i HA-brugerfladen.
compliance_messages.script_no_description: Scriptet '{alias}' har ingen beskrivelse. Tilføj et 'description:' felt for at dokumentere, hvad det gør.
compliance_messages.entity_no_area: Enheden '{name}' ({entity_id}) har intet område tildelt. Tildel det via Indstillinger → Enheder.
compliance_messages.entities_no_area_bulk: {count} fysiske enheder har intet område tildelt. Tildel områder via Indstillinger → Enheder & Tjenester → Enheder.

diag_prompts.step1_yaml: 1. Forklar mig problemet i enkle termer — hvorfor dette er dårlig praksis og hvad der kan gå galt
diag_prompts.step2_yaml: 2. Vis mig den nøjagtige YAML-blok der forårsager problemet (📄 Nuværende YAML:) og den foreslåede rettelse (✅ Foreslået rettet YAML:)
diag_prompts.step3: 3. Præsentér mig disse muligheder og afvent mit svar inden du handler:
diag_prompts.step1_action: 1. Forklar mig problemet i enkle termer — hvorfor dette er problematisk og hvad der kan ske
diag_prompts.step2_action: 2. Beskriv præcist hvad du har tænkt dig at gøre: {proposed}
diag_prompts.choice_backup_apply: 📋  Lav først en sikkerhedskopi, anvend derefter
diag_prompts.choice_backup_proceed: 📋  Lav først en sikkerhedskopi, fortsæt derefter

problems.no_alias: har ingen alias — dens navn i UI'et er det rå entity_id, ulæseligt
problems.no_description: har ingen beskrivelse — svær at vedligeholde på lang sigt
problems.never_triggered: er aldrig blevet udløst — ser ud til at være ubrugt eller forkert konfigureret
problems.duplicate: ser ud til at være en dublet af en anden automatisering
problems.device_id: bruger et device_id i stedet for et entity_id i en trigger/handling/betingelse
problems.device_platform: bruger en forældet "device"-platform i stedet for en native trigger/betingelse
problems.unknown_service: kalder en tjeneste der ikke findes i HA
problems.unknown_area: refererer til et område der ikke eksisterer i HA
problems.unknown_label: refererer til et label der ikke eksisterer i HA
problems.mode_motion_single: håndterer bevægelse/tilstedeværelse men bruger mode:single — den vil gå glip af udløsninger
problems.template_simple: bruger en Jinja2-skabelon hvor en native HA-trigger eller betingelse ville være tilstrækkelig
problems.empty_script: scriptet er tomt — det har ingen handlinger
problems.script_orphan: scriptet kaldes ikke af nogen automatisering eller andet script
problems.zombie_entity: entiteten er en spøgelse/zombie-post i HA-registret — dens kildeintegration eksisterer ikke længere
problems.helper_unused: hjælperen bruges ikke af nogen automatisering eller script
problems.hardcoded_secret: en hemmelighed (adgangskode, token, API-nøgle) er skrevet i klartekst i konfigurationen
problems.compliance_no_uid: automatiseringen har ingen unique_id — kan ikke redigeres via HA-grænsefladen
problems.wait_template: it uses wait_template when wait_for_trigger would be more efficient
problems.excessive_delay: it contains an excessive delay that blocks the HA execution thread
problems.blueprint_candidate: it matches a repetitive pattern — good candidate for blueprinting
problems.blueprint_missing: it references a blueprint whose file no longer exists
problems.blueprint_inputs: the blueprint it uses has missing or empty inputs
problems.script_cycle: the script creates an infinite loop by calling itself directly or indirectly
problems.script_depth: the script has a call chain that is too deep — risk of stack overflow or timeout
problems.script_single_mode: the script is in "single" mode but may be called in parallel or loop
problems.empty_scene: the scene is empty — it has no entities defined
problems.scene_duplicate: the scene is a duplicate of another existing scene
problems.scene_unavailable: the scene references an entity that is currently unavailable
problems.scene_not_triggered: the scene is not triggered by any automation
problems.disabled_referenced: the entity is disabled but still referenced in one or more automations
problems.broken_device: the entity points to a device that no longer exists in the registry
problems.helper_disabled_only: the helper is only used by disabled automations
problems.helper_no_name: the helper has no friendly name — its raw ID is shown in the UI
problems.input_number_range: the input_number helper has an invalid min/max range (min ≥ max or incoherent step)
problems.input_select_duplicate: the input_select helper has duplicate options in its list
problems.input_select_empty: the input_select helper contains an empty option ("") in its list
problems.input_text_pattern: the input_text helper has an invalid or malformed regex pattern
problems.timer_zero: the timer has a duration of 0 — it fires instantly and serves no purpose
problems.timer_orphaned: the timer is not controlled by any automation
problems.timer_never_started: the timer has never been started since its creation
problems.dashboard_missing: a dashboard references entity "{eid}" which no longer exists
problems.missing_state_class: the sensor has no state_class defined — HA cannot generate long-term statistics
problems.template_no_metadata: the template sensor has no device_class or unit_of_measurement
problems.template_no_unavail: the template does not handle the case where the source entity is unavailable (None)
problems.template_now_trigger: the automation uses now() in a template without a time trigger — the value will never update
problems.template_cycle: the template sensor creates a circular dependency with another template
problems.group_empty: the group is empty or all its member entities are unavailable
problems.group_missing: the group references entities that no longer exist
problems.group_nested: the group is nested too deeply (> 2 levels) — may cause performance issues
problems.zone_no_entity: the zone has no tracking entity (person/device_tracker) assigned
problems.unknown_floor: the automation references a floor that does not exist in HA
problems.compliance_no_name: the entity has no friendly name — its raw entity_id is shown in the UI
problems.area_high: the area has a high complexity score — too many entities/automations/scripts concentrated
problems.area_merge: two very similar areas with few entities could be merged
problems.redundancy_overlap: this automation logically overlaps another — same triggers, similar actions
problems.redundancy_blueprint: ≥3 automations are structurally identical — candidates for blueprinting
problems.redundancy_native: this automation reimplements functionality already built into HA natively

hints.no_alias: Suggest a readable alias based on what the automation does
hints.no_description: Suggest a clear description of what the automation does
hints.device_id: Show the trigger/action/condition block with the device_id AND the corrected block with the entity_id. Explain why a device_id breaks when hardware is replaced.
hints.device_platform: Show the current "device" block AND the equivalent native block (state, numeric_state, etc.)
hints.deprecated_service: Identify the obsolete service in the YAML and propose the current replacement service
hints.unknown_service: Identify the missing service and propose either the correct name or an alternative service
hints.unknown_area: Show the missing area reference and suggest existing areas as alternatives
hints.unknown_label: Show the missing label reference and suggest existing labels or creating the missing label
hints.mode_motion_single: Show the current "mode: single" block and the corrected YAML with "mode: restart". Explain the difference between single/restart/queued for motion automations.
hints.template_simple: Show the current template and the equivalent native trigger/condition. Explain why natives are preferred (performance, readability, reliability).
hints.wait_template: Show the current wait_template block and the equivalent wait_for_trigger block. Explain the resource consumption difference.
hints.excessive_delay: Identify the problematic delay block and propose a time trigger or wait_for_trigger instead
hints.blueprint_candidate: Explain what a blueprint is and why it simplifies maintenance
hints.blueprint_inputs: Show the blueprint definition and the missing inputs in the automation
hints.script_cycle: Identify the cyclic call path and show how to break it in the YAML
hints.script_depth: Show the call chain and propose a refactored flattened version
hints.script_single_mode: Explain single/queued/restart modes for scripts and show the corrected YAML with the right mode
hints.scene_unavailable: Identify the unavailable entity and propose either removing or replacing it
hints.zombie_entity: Explain what the HA entity registry is and why these ghost entries accumulate
hints.helper_unused: Explain the risks of keeping unused helpers (confusion, memory overhead)
hints.helper_no_name: Suggest a readable name based on the type and probable use of the helper
hints.input_number_range: Show the current configuration (min/max/step) and the corrected version
hints.input_select_duplicate: Show the current list with duplicates identified and the deduplicated proposed list
hints.input_select_empty: Show the current list and the cleaned list without the empty option
hints.input_text_pattern: Show the current pattern, explain the error, and propose either fixing or removing it
hints.timer_zero: Suggest a sensible duration (e.g. 00:05:00) or recommend removing the timer if unused
hints.dashboard_missing: Identify the card referencing this entity and propose either fixing the entity_id or removing the card
hints.hardcoded_secret: Show the relevant line (mask the sensitive value with ***) and the corrected YAML using !secret. Explain how secrets.yaml works in HA.
hints.missing_state_class: Explain the possible values (measurement, total, total_increasing) and which is appropriate for this sensor. Show the YAML with and without state_class.
hints.template_no_metadata: Suggest appropriate device_class and unit_of_measurement values based on the sensor's data type
hints.template_no_unavail: Show the current template and the safe version with "is not none" or "| default(0, true)" check. Explain why an entity can be None.
hints.template_now_trigger: Show the problematic now() template and propose either a time_pattern trigger or replacing now() with an input_datetime helper
hints.template_cycle: Identify the dependency loop and propose how to break it (direct value, intermediate helper, etc.)
hints.group_missing: Show the current members with missing entities identified and the corrected version without broken references
hints.group_nested: Show the current hierarchy and propose a flattened version with direct groups
hints.unknown_floor: Identify the missing floor reference and suggest existing floors or creating the missing floor
hints.compliance_no_name: Suggest a readable name based on the entity_id and the entity's domain
hints.compliance_no_uid: Explain why unique_id is required for UI editing. Show the current YAML and propose a unique_id based on the automation name.
hints.area_high: Explain the composite complexity concept and how to reduce it by separating areas
hints.area_merge: Explain the benefits of simplifying area structure in HA
hints.redundancy_overlap: Identify the duplicate automation, show both YAMLs side by side and propose a merged version
hints.redundancy_native: Identify the corresponding native feature (adaptive_lighting, schedule, alert…) and show how to enable it instead

proposed.never_triggered: tjek spor med ha_get_automation_traces, slet derefter hvis bekræftet ubrugt
proposed.empty_script: slet scriptet hvis ubrugt, eller tilføj handlinger
proposed.zombie_entity: verificer at ingen automatisering refererer til det, slet derefter den forældreløse post
proposed.helper_unused: bekræft ikke-brug med ha_deep_search, slet derefter hvis bekræftet
proposed.duplicate: read both automations, compare their logic, then propose deleting or merging
proposed.blueprint_candidate: create a reusable blueprint with ha_create_blueprint and migrate this automation as the first instance
proposed.blueprint_missing: either import the missing blueprint, correct the path, or reconvert to a classic automation
proposed.script_orphan: confirm non-use with ha_deep_search, then delete if confirmed
proposed.empty_scene: delete the scene or add entities to it
proposed.scene_duplicate: compare both scenes and delete one
proposed.scene_not_triggered: check if it's used elsewhere (dashboards, scripts) then delete if truly unused
proposed.disabled_referenced: either re-enable the entity, or update the automations that reference it
proposed.broken_device: either delete the orphan entry, or re-associate the entity to the correct device
proposed.helper_disabled_only: decide if the helper is still needed, then delete or keep
proposed.timer_orphaned: verify it is not triggered manually, then delete if confirmed unused
proposed.timer_never_started: check if an automation should start it, then delete if unused
proposed.group_empty: either delete the group, or update its members with valid entities
proposed.zone_no_entity: list available person entities and assign one or more to this zone
proposed.area_high: analyze the zone composition and propose splitting into logical sub-zones
proposed.area_merge: analyze both zones and propose how to merge them cleanly
proposed.redundancy_blueprint: create a generic blueprint and migrate each automation as an instance
proposed.script_orphan_hint: Explain how to detect orphan scripts and the risks of keeping them
proposed.blueprint_candidate_hint: Explain what a HA blueprint is and the benefits of centralized maintenance

redundancy.blueprint_problem: denne automatisering er en del af en gruppe på ≥3 strukturelt identiske automatiseringer — kandidat til blueprint
redundancy.blueprint_step1: 1. Forklar mig hvad et HA-blueprint er og hvorfor centralisering af disse automatiseringer forenkler vedligeholdelse
redundancy.blueprint_step2: 2. Vis mig den nuværende YAML for denne automatisering (📄 Nuværende YAML:) og det foreslåede generiske blueprint (✅ Foreslået blueprint:)
redundancy.blueprint_choice_proceed: ✅  OK, opret blueprint og migrer automatiseringer
redundancy.blueprint_choice_backup: 📋  Lav først sikkerhedskopi, opret derefter blueprint
redundancy.native_problem: denne automatisering reimplementerer manuelt en funktion der allerede er integreret native i HA: "{detail}"
redundancy.native_step1: 1. Forklar mig hvorfor brug af native HA-funktionen er bedre
redundancy.native_step2: 2. Vis mig den nuværende YAML (📄 Nuværende YAML:) og hvordan den tilsvarende native funktion aktiveres (✅ Foreslået native konfiguration:)
redundancy.overlap_problem: automatiseringer "{alias_a}" ({eid_a}) og "{alias_b}" har en identisk trigger: "{trigger}" — de overlapper logisk
redundancy.overlap_step1: 1. Forklar mig hvorfor to automatiseringer med samme trigger kan konfliktere
redundancy.overlap_step2: 2. Vis mig begge YAML'er side om side og den foreslåede sammenflettet version (✅ Konsolideret YAML:)

area.cross_area_problem: denne automatisering berører flere områder ({areas}) — svær at vedligeholde og debugge
area.cross_area_step1: 1. Forklar mig hvorfor det er bedre at have én automatisering per område
area.cross_area_step2: 2. Vis mig den nuværende YAML (📄 Nuværende YAML:) og hvordan den opdeles i separate automatiseringer per område (✅ Foreslået YAML:)
area.merge_problem: område "{area}" indeholder {count} enkle automatiseringer (gennemsnitsscore {score}) med lignende triggers
area.merge_read: → List automatiseringer i dette område med: ha_get_entities(area="{area}")
area.merge_step1: 1. Forklar mig fordele og ulemper ved at flette automatiseringer
area.merge_step2: 2. Vis mig de nuværende YAML'er og en flettet version (✅ Foreslået flettet YAML:)
area.split_problem: område "{area}" indeholder komplekse automatiseringer (gennemsnitsscore {score}) der blander for mange ansvarsområder
area.split_step1: 1. Forklar mig enkelt ansvarsprincippet anvendt på HA-automatiseringer
area.split_step2: 2. Vis mig den nuværende YAML og foreslå opdeling i separate automatiseringer (✅ Foreslået YAML:)

analyzer.trigger_uses_device_id: Udløser {idx} bruger device_id, som bryder når enheden tilføjes igen
analyzer.condition_uses_device_id: Betingelse {idx} bruger device_id, som bryder når enheden tilføjes igen
analyzer.action_uses_device_id: Handling {idx} bruger device_id, som bryder når enheden tilføjes igen
analyzer.action_target_uses_device_id: Handling {idx} bruger device_id i target, som bryder når enheden tilføjes igen
analyzer.condition_uses_device_platform: Betingelse {idx} bruger betingelsestypen 'device', som er skrøbelig
analyzer.template_simple_state: Betingelse {idx} bruger skabelon til simpel tilstandskontrol
analyzer.template_numeric_comparison: Betingelse {idx} bruger skabelon til numerisk sammenligning
analyzer.never_triggered: Automatisering er aldrig blevet udløst siden HA genstart
analyzer.add_description: Tilføj en beskrivelse for at dokumentere automatiseringens formål
analyzer.add_alias: Tilføj et alias for at gøre automatiseringen identificerbar
analyzer.use_entity_id_instead_device: Brug entity_id i stedet for device_id for pålidelighed
analyzer.use_state_platform: Brug state/numeric_state-platform med entity_id i stedet
analyzer.use_state_condition: Brug den native 'state'-betingelse i stedet for skabelon
analyzer.use_entity_id_in_target: Brug entity_id i target i stedet for device_id
analyzer.use_wait_for_trigger: Brug wait_for_trigger med tilstandsudløser (hændelsesstyret, ikke polling)
analyzer.verify_triggers: Verificér at udløsere er korrekt konfigureret eller at automatiseringen er nødvendig
analyzer.specify_zone_entity: Angiv hvilken enhed der skal spores i zonen
analyzer.entity_not_updated: Enhed er ikke opdateret i {days} dage
analyzer.entity_referenced_not_exist: Refereret af {count} automatisering/er men eksisterer ikke
analyzer.orphaned_registry_entry: Forældreløs registreringspost: integration '{platform}' mangler eller er deaktiveret
analyzer.remove_orphaned: Fjern denne forældreløse enhed fra dit register
analyzer.use_entity_id_or_update: Brug entity_id eller opdatér til en gyldig enhed
analyzer.entity_may_be_broken: Enhed kan være defekt eller ikke længere i brug
analyzer.triggered_recently_loop: Udløst meget nyligt ({delta}s siden), mulig løkke
analyzer.complex_automation: Automatisering har {count} handlinger, hvilket er komplekst
analyzer.parallel_mode_resources: Paralleltilstand med max={max_runs} kan forbruge ressourcer
analyzer.triggers_modifies_same: Automatisering udløses på og ændrer de samme enheder: {entities}
analyzer.expensive_template_no_domain: Skabelon bruger 'states | selectattr' uden domænefilter — genevalueres ved hver tilstandsændring
analyzer.add_domain_filter: Tilføj et domænefilter (f.eks. 'states.sensor | selectattr(...)') for at begrænse evalueringsomfanget
analyzer.expensive_template_states_all: Skabelon lister alle enhedstilstande — ekstremt dyrt, genevalueres ved hver tilstandsændring
analyzer.filter_by_domain: Filtrer tilstande efter domæne (f.eks. 'states.light | list') for at reducere skabelonens evalueringsomkostning
analyzer.hardcoded_secret: Potentiel hårdkodet hemmelighed eller API-nøgle opdaget
analyzer.sensitive_data_exposure: Handling {idx}: Potentiel eksponering af følsomme data i notifikation
analyzer.use_secret_yaml: Brug !secret i secrets.yaml i stedet for at hårdkode følsomme data
analyzer.avoid_secrets_notifications: Undgå at sende hemmeligheder eller adgangskoder i notifikationsmeddelelser
analyzer.duplicate_automation: Automatisering har {count} dublet/ter med identiske udløsere og handlinger
analyzer.remove_duplicate: Overvej at fjerne dubletter eller konsolidere: {others}
analyzer.excessive_delay: Handling {idx} har en overdreven forsinkelse på {minutes} minutter (>30 min)
analyzer.use_input_number_delay: Overvej at bruge en input_number-hjælper for at gøre forsinkelsen konfigurerbar
analyzer.blueprint_file_not_found: Blueprint-fil ikke fundet på disk: blueprints/automation/{path}
analyzer.reinstall_blueprint: Geninstallér eller gendan blueprint-filen på blueprints/automation/{path}
analyzer.configure_blueprint_inputs: Konfigurér de nødvendige blueprint-inddata i use_blueprint.input
analyzer.unused_input_boolean: Input boolean '{entity_id}' bruges ikke i nogen automatisering eller script
analyzer.remove_unused_helper: Overvej at fjerne denne ubrugte hjælper for at rydde op i konfigurationen
analyzer.unknown_service: Action {idx} calls service "{service}" which is not registered in Home Assistant
analyzer.use_existing_service: Verify that the integration providing "{service}" is installed and loaded. Check for typos.
analyzer.unknown_area_reference: Action {idx} targets area_id "{area_id}" which no longer exists in your Areas registry
analyzer.check_area_name: Go to Settings → Areas & Zones to check if "{area_id}" was renamed or deleted, then update this automation.
analyzer.unknown_floor_reference: Action {idx} targets floor_id "{floor_id}" which no longer exists in your Floors registry
analyzer.check_floor_name: Go to Settings → Areas & Zones → Floors to check if "{floor_id}" was renamed or deleted.
analyzer.unknown_label_reference: Action {idx} targets label_id "{label_id}" which no longer exists in your Labels registry
analyzer.check_label_name: Go to Settings → Labels to check if "{label_id}" was renamed or deleted.
analyzer.ghost_automation: Spøgelsesautomatisering: aktiv men ikke udløst i {days} dage
analyzer.fix_unavailable_triggers: Kontrollér eller erstat de utilgængelige udløserenheder — sandsynlig rodårsag
analyzer.verify_triggers_restrictive: Check if triggers are too restrictive, or if the automation is still needed
analyzer.probable_duplicate_automation: Sandsynlig dublet med {pct}% lighed med "{other}" (Jaccard af udløsere/handlinger)
analyzer.review_probable_duplicate: Sammenlign med "{other}" og flet eller fjern dubletten

*H.A.C.A — Home Assistant Config Auditor*

websocket.no_ai_service:
⚠️ Ingen AI-tjeneste (ai_task) er konfigureret i Home Assistant.

Gå til **Indstillinger → Generelt → AI-forslag** for at aktivere en.
websocket.all_ai_failed: ⚠️ Alle AI-tjenester mislykkedes (kvote nået eller tjeneste utilgængelig). Kontrollér din konfiguration.

conversation.fallback_intro: Kunne ikke nå en avanceret AI-assistent (OpenAI/Gemini), her er en lokal analyse:

impacts.device_id: Brug af device_id i stedet for enheder svækker din automatisering — udskiftning af hardware bryder forbindelsen.
impacts.unavailable: Denne enhed eksisterer ikke længere eller er offline, hvilket kan blokere dine automatiseringer eller dashboards.
impacts.zombie: Denne enhed eksisterer ikke længere eller er offline, hvilket kan blokere dine automatiseringer eller dashboards.
impacts.mode: Den enkle eksekveringstilstand risikerer at miste udløsere, hvis automatiseringen allerede kører.
impacts.secret: Følsomme data er eksponeret i klartekst — dette er en sikkerhedsrisiko.
impacts.security: Følsomme data er eksponeret i klartekst — dette er en sikkerhedsrisiko.
impacts.default: Dette problem kan påvirke stabiliteten eller ydeevnen i dit system.

ai_prompts.explain_issue_fallback_intro: Could not reach an advanced AI assistant, here is a local analysis:
ai_prompts.explain_issue_fallback_device_id: Using device_id instead of entities weakens your automation — replacing hardware will break the link.
ai_prompts.explain_issue_fallback_unavailable: This entity no longer exists or is offline, which can block your automations.
ai_prompts.explain_issue_fallback_mode: The single mode risks dropping triggers if the automation is already running.
ai_prompts.explain_issue_fallback_secret: Sensitive data is exposed in plaintext — security risk.
ai_prompts.explain_issue_fallback_default: This issue may affect the stability or performance of your system.
ai_prompts.chat_system:
You are a Home Assistant expert assistant. Answer questions about Home Assistant configuration, automations and HACA issues.

{context}
ai_prompts.chat_context: HACA context: {total_issues} issues found ({automations} automations, {scripts} scripts).
ai_prompts.fallback_intro: Could not reach an advanced AI assistant, here is a local analysis:
ai_prompts.fallback_impact_device_id: Using 'device_id' instead of entities weakens your automation — replacing hardware will break the link.
ai_prompts.fallback_impact_unavailable: This entity no longer exists or is offline, which can block your automations.
ai_prompts.fallback_impact_mode: The 'single' mode risks dropping triggers if the automation is already running.
ai_prompts.fallback_impact_security: Sensitive data is exposed in plaintext — security risk.
ai_prompts.fallback_impact_default: This issue may affect the stability or performance of your system.
ai_prompts.complexity_prompt:
You are a Home Assistant expert. Analyse the complexity of this {kind}.

** {kind_upper} :** {alias}
**Entity ID :** {entity_id}
**HACA Score :** {score}
**Score detail :** {score_line}

{yaml_section}

MISSION IN 2 PARTS:
PART 1 - EXPLANATION (3-5 sentences):
Explain why this {kind} is complex, which parts contribute most to the score, and the risks (maintenance, debugging).

PART 2 - YAML PROPOSAL:
Propose a concrete split: extract repetitive action blocks into separate scripts, simplify the main file. Provide the full YAML.

RESPOND STRICTLY WITH THIS FORMAT:
```explanation
[your explanation here]
```

```yaml_proposal
[proposed yaml here]
```
ai_prompts.complexity_fallback: Complexity score: {score}. This {kind} contains {triggers} trigger(s), {conditions} condition(s), {actions} recursive action(s) and {templates} template(s). Consider extracting repetitive action blocks into reusable scripts.

compliance_messages.helper_no_area: Helper '{name}' has no area. Assign it in Settings → Helpers.
compliance_messages.entity_no_area: Entity '{name}' ({entity_id}) has no area. Assign via Settings → Devices.
